2008.issue: [S2008] Version 6.0.1 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3039.issue: [W3039] Could not retrieve workflow run data for "test-and-release.yml": Request failed with status code 502

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_ical/items/icalFile" attribute "label" uses key "Upload files" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/klein0r/ioBroker.birthdays/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
